sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70075" key="nekrepa/rths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρ-επάρτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n70075.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remover of corpses,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).110</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).215</biblScope></bibl>, prob. l. ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.117</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
